canonical_contract.description: 27 coordinates at eight historical log-spaced rows plus curve mean

frozen_gate_score_discrimination.guardrail: The frozen gate target is sustained migration rate >=2.5e-4. The human focal parameter is a 0.17 pulse proportion and the dog focal parameter is a 0.05 backward-lineage per-generation catalog rate. Scores are not comparable effect sizes.
frozen_gate_score_discrimination.status: score-only positive/control discrimination diagnostic; no threshold accuracy or appreciable-migration calibration claim

analysis.guardrail: This balanced bank adds two demographic systems, not 60 independent systems. Ashkenazi pulse timing is model-assumed; CanFam retains deep 0.99/0.02 ancestral jackal flow in both conditions and its focal rate is far outside training. The common recombination rate is a canonical-transfer contract, not a dog estimate. Positive-row direction recall is compatibility with each declared direction under its complex retained background, not causal attribution to the focal edge.

orbit_composition_mean_variance.guardrail: B and C each supply one panel and 30 positive Monte Carlo rows; constant-B and constant-C panel baselines are both 0.5. Wilson intervals are descriptive within fixed catalog panels, not across-demography confidence intervals.

ashk_ceu_to_waj.interpretation: compatibility with the declared focal direction under the retained full catalog background; not causal proof that the focal edge was recovered

canfam_isw_to_glj.interpretation: compatibility with the declared focal direction under the retained full catalog background; not causal proof that the focal edge was recovered

orbit_composition_mean_variance.status: target-blind frozen canonical C=1; raw_all is primary

raw_all.guardrail: B and C each supply one panel and 30 positive Monte Carlo rows; constant-B and constant-C panel baselines are both 0.5. Wilson intervals are descriptive within fixed catalog panels, not across-demography confidence intervals.

ashk_ceu_to_waj.interpretation: compatibility with the declared focal direction under the retained full catalog background; not causal proof that the focal edge was recovered

canfam_isw_to_glj.interpretation: compatibility with the declared focal direction under the retained full catalog background; not causal proof that the focal edge was recovered

raw_all.status: target-blind frozen canonical C=1; raw_all is primary

raw_mean_variance.guardrail: B and C each supply one panel and 30 positive Monte Carlo rows; constant-B and constant-C panel baselines are both 0.5. Wilson intervals are descriptive within fixed catalog panels, not across-demography confidence intervals.

canfam_isw_to_glj.interpretation: compatibility with the declared focal direction under the retained full catalog background; not causal proof that the focal edge was recovered

raw_mean_variance.status: target-blind frozen canonical C=1; raw_all is primary

configuration.checkpoint_portability_guardrail: source and retained-tree paths are absolute and revalidated; checkpoint is bound to its run layout

specification.focal_parameter_semantics: backward MassMigration proportion; forward-time pulse ancestry component, not a continuous migration rate

canfam_isw_to_glj.description: Dog domestication and admixture with wolf (Freedman et al., 2014)

specification.focal_parameter_semantics: backward-lineage continuous rate M[GLJ,ISW]; forward edge is ISW->GLJ, but 0.05 is not a forward migrant fraction

padze.site_filter: globally polymorphic in frozen triplet; all alleles retained

configuration.pairing_guardrail: families match panel/replicate only; positive and control use independent ancestry and mutation seeds
configuration.raw_retention: first positive/control tree sequence for each panel (four trees)
configuration.runtime_guardrail: each single msprime call is uninterruptible until that job returns; full runs are Azure-only at nice>=10 with the compute gate polled between simulation and PADZE jobs

sequence.recombination_guardrail: frozen canonical-training rate for cross-species comparability, not a species-faithful dog recombination estimate

initial_compute_gate.known_category_error: trading availability is inactive while direct local/Azure pressure telemetry remains below pinned safety thresholds

pressure_thresholds.basis: one half of the canonical CPU PSI distress threshold and one third of the memory threshold; one nice>=10 process is the minimum throttle mode

pre_analysis_compute_gate.known_category_error: trading availability is inactive while direct local/Azure pressure telemetry remains below pinned safety thresholds

pressure_thresholds.basis: one half of the canonical CPU PSI distress threshold and one third of the memory threshold; one nice>=10 process is the minimum throttle mode
